name: llm-router
description: Route every Droid task to the cheapest capable model across 20+ AI providers. Tracks cross-session savings, enforces routing policy, and sends weekly Slack digests.

interface.shortDescription: Smart LLM routing — cheapest capable model, every task
interface.longDescription: llm-router is an MCP server that automatically routes prompts to the best-fit model from 20+ providers. Simple questions go to Gemini Flash or Haiku ($0.001); complex reasoning goes to o3 or GPT-4o only when needed. Tracks savings across sessions. Works with Factory Droid, Claude Code, Codex CLI, and GitHub Copilot.
defaultPrompt: How much have I saved with llm-router this week?
Route this task to the best model
